Home.title: Hello, my name is Rafael Silva.
Home.description: I am a Web designer & Front-end Developer

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.desc1: Project of a Mobile Productivity App, developed for my personal use, using React Native and Expo.

About.title: About Me
About.description: I am a front-end developer who creates engaging and functional digital experiences. With a solid background in graphic design, I bring a unique perspective to web development, combining aesthetics and usability. I have experience in HTML, CSS, Node.js, low-code tools like WordPress, and frameworks like React, which allows me to build modern and responsive interfaces. I am always seeking to learn new technologies and improve my skills to deliver high-quality projects.

Services.title: Services
Services.description1: Creation of modern and responsive web interfaces using the latest technologies and best development practices.
Services.description2: Design of modern and responsive web interfaces, focused on user experience and aesthetics.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: If you have a project in mind or want to discuss how I can help, feel free to get in touch with me. I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations.

Plans.title: Plans
Plans.plan1: Maintenance or Support for Existing Systems
Plans.description1: Bug fixes, performance improvements, functionality adjustments, and technical support for existing systems. Hourly billing to ensure flexibility according to the project's needs. Rate: $40/h.
Plans.description2: Creation of modern, fast, and optimized landing pages for conversion. Ideal for promoting products, services, or campaigns. Simple landing page: $680. Advanced landing page with admin panel: $1,920.
Plans.description3: Development of custom applications to meet specific business needs, from web systems to personalized tools. Hourly billing to track the complexity of each project. Rate: $25/h.
